package rulecoverage

func NegativeGoroutineWithoutShutdownPath() string {
    ruleID := "goroutine_without_shutdown_path"
    family := "concurrency"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Looping goroutine literals without an obvious ctx.Done() or done-channel shutdown path."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
